# zeta: AI Chat, Story, Play · AI Chat

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 22, 2026 - Jun 26, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Raquel Gil_, Jun 26, 2026, 2/5: "Great, they screwed up the app with the obligatory announcement and having to wait 30 seconds, I'm not saying it's bad but I can't chat well, it jumps every 7 MESSAGES, fix it. Besides, it's full of errors and glitches, when you spend a little time talking to the bot it says RANDOM words and the character barely speaks, a shame, I liked it better before, that's why the 2 stars. Besides, it is full of Bugs that take you out of the app and the language changes or does not understand you, it is very ugly 🙃"
            2. _lil diamond writer_, May 24, 2026, 2/5: "the app itself is very good, but the ad after every few minutes is a bit much and making it unusable"
            3. _soyun._, Jun 11, 2026, 3/5: "I really like the app, but the free model is very buggy, often repeating certain punctuation marks or words."

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      4 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 20, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _William Blazkowicz_, Jul 20, 2026, 1/5: "the ads absolutely take the entire piss. the ai literally acted deliberately retarded to show you more ads"
            2. _Olivia_, Jul 20, 2026, 2/5: "forgets things VERY easily, lots of weird glitches. too many ads. Ive been sat in one chat with this ai for 15 minutes and all its saying is narrator: narrator: narrator: narrator: narrator: narrator: narrator: narrator: narrator: and it goes on."
            3. _Dawn Lakes_, Jul 20, 2026, 2/5: "the app is good but, im getting ads every time I send a message now it won't let me even use the app"
